# C2 Hub docs

- [Introduction](/docs) — Install components into the consuming app and own the source. The registry ships files, dependencies, and token layers instead of hiding behavior behind a runtime package.
- [Installation](/docs/installation) — Install C2 Hub components into a Vite, React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS v4 project.
- [Theming](/docs/theming) — C2 Hub uses a layered OKLCH token system built for dark tactical surfaces.
- [Components](/docs/components) — Installable primitives and C2-specific assemblies published through the registry.
- [Button](/docs/components/button) — Buttons trigger actions, navigation, and icon-only controls.

Registry base install: pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @c2/c2-base
